summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 9 - New Features. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile='12345' returns 400 error
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile='1234567890' (starts with 1) returns 400
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile='5234567890' (starts with 5) returns 400
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile starting with 6 works (201)
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile starting with 7 works (201)
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile starting with 8 works (201)
Mobile validation: POST /api/users with mobile starting with 9 works (201)
Mobile validation: Frontend user form filters non-numeric characters
Mobile validation: Frontend user form enforces max 10 characters
Mobile validation: Frontend user form has pattern attribute [6-9][0-9]{9}
Image upload: POST /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/0/images with JPEG file works
Image upload: GET /api/accounts/{id} returns jewellery items with images array
Image viewer: View images button shows count (3/5)
Image viewer: Lightbox modal with thumbnails and navigation
Image viewer: Upload from device button present
Image viewer: Upload from camera button present
History tab: Account with close_history shows CLOSED events with date, by, remarks, pending amounts
History tab: Account with reopen_history shows REOPENED events with date, by, reason
History tab: Events displayed in chronological timeline
Close account: POST /api/accounts/{id}/close pushes to close_history array
Closed account: PUT update returns 403
Closed account: DELETE returns 403
Closed account: POST add landed entry returns 403
Reopen account: POST /api/accounts/{id}/reopen without reason returns 400
Reopen account: POST /api/accounts/{id}/reopen with reason works (200)
Reopen account: After reopen, edit works again
Reopen account: reopen_history array updated with reason
Date picker: AccountFormPage opening_date has max attribute set to today
Date picker: AccountFormPage landed_date has max attribute set to today
DateRangePicker: Dual-month calendar opens
DateRangePicker: Preset buttons (7d, 30d, 90d, 1y) present
Dashboard: Separate 'Active Accounts' and 'Closed Accounts' sections
Dashboard: Shows total_accounts, active_accounts, closed_accounts
Accounts page: Search input present
Accounts page: Village filter (SearchableDropdown) present
Accounts page: DateRangePicker present
Core flows: Admin login works
Core flows: Operator login works
Core flows: Accounts list works

mobile_validation.details: Backend regex ^[6-9]\d{9}$ validates 10 digits starting with 6-9. Frontend filters non-numeric, enforces max 10 chars, has pattern attribute.

image_upload.details: Image upload endpoint works. Max 5 images per item enforced. Lightbox viewer with thumbnails, navigation, upload from device/camera buttons.

history_tab.details: History tab shows close_history and reopen_history events in chronological timeline with date, by, remarks/reason, pending amounts.

close_account_history.details: POST /api/accounts/{id}/close pushes to close_history array with closed_at, closed_by_name, remarks, final_pending_amount, final_pending_interest.

closed_account_restrictions.details: Closed accounts return 403 for PUT update, DELETE, POST add landed/received entries.

reopen_account.details: Reopen requires reason (400 if empty). After reopen, edit works. reopen_history updated with reopened_at, reopened_by_name, reason.

date_picker_max.details: AccountFormPage date inputs have max attribute set to today's date.

dashboard_separation.details: Dashboard shows separate Active Accounts and Closed Accounts sections with totals.

accounts_page_filters.details: Search input, Village SearchableDropdown, Status select, DateRangePicker all present in filter section.

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile validation works at both backend (regex) and frontend (input filtering, pattern attribute)
Image upload with max 5 limit enforced
History tab displays close/reopen events chronologically
Closed account restrictions properly enforced at API level
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed accounts for testing closed account restrictions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified working. Test credentials: admin/admin123, operator1/operator123. Account with images: ACC000046 (id: 69bed77d5b33dabe3fd5ef75) has 3 images. Account with close/reopen history: 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72 has 3 history events. Mobile validation regex: ^[6-9]\d{9}$. Image upload endpoint: POST /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{item_index}/images.
